title: Mizuno Emissive Ores
description: Makes some blocks glow to spot them easier. Meant for use with Mizuno’s 16 Craft!
body:
Gives Mizuno’s 16 Craft’s cave ores and some nether blocks an emissive glow to notice them easier in caves and dark surroundings! Meant for use with [Mizuno](https://www.mediafire.com/file/42pqrtiwkmali5j/Mizuno's_16_Craft_JE_1.20.4-1.0_230105.zip/file) and [Modern Mizuno](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-mizunos).

## ✨ Dependencies
Requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity). Also requires the mentioned/linked texture packs for the full experience!

## ✨ Version Support
The pack should work perfectly fine from **1.20.x up to 26.1.2**.

## ✨ Notes
- It _will_ say in-game that it is “Broken or incompatible”, but it will work regardless. Please let me know if it does not for whatever reason.
- You are free to include this in modpacks! No credits necessary, but it is appreciated.
- Load order should be:
  - Mizuno Emissive Ores
  - Modern Mizuno
  - Mizuno’s 16 Craft

## ✨ Credits
- Mizuno for the OG Mizuno pack
- Garden Gals for the Mizuno update

See Gallery for preview. ✨
